name: Chicken Enchiladas with Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Seed and chop the jalapeno pepper.
2. Saute onion in oil until translucent.
3. Stir in garlic, tomato sauce, salt, sugar, chicken, and peppers. Cover and simmer for 5 minutes.
4. In a large saucepan, heat cream and dissolve bouillion cubes in it. Set aside.
5. In a small skillet, heat about 1/3 cup of oil and dip each tortilla in hot oil, turning once, for a few seconds to soften. Drain on paper towels.
6. Assemble Enchiladas: Dip a tortilla in the cream mixture, place on a flat surface, put 2-3 tablespoons of chicken mixture in the center, and roll up. Place rolled tortilla, seam-side down, in a 13x9 inch baking dish.
7. Continue with remaining tortillas.
8. Pour all remaining cream mixture over enchiladas and cover with grated cheese.
9. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 25-30 minutes, until cheese is melted and browned.
